message:
chore: update gitignore/ubsignore for ephemeral files

- Ignore nested pkg/ui/.beads/ state directory
- Ignore large benchmark test data in tests/testdata/benchmark/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,3 +32,9 @@ pkg/export/wasm_scorer/pkg/
 node_modules/
 beads_viewer_graph*.html
 test-results/
+
+# Nested beads state
+pkg/ui/.beads/
+
+# Large benchmark test data (generated)
+tests/testdata/benchmark/

@@ -1 +1,7 @@
 beads_reference/
+
+# Nested beads state (not code)
+pkg/ui/.beads/
+
+# Large benchmark test data (not code)
+tests/testdata/benchmark/
